purpose: Defines Delano operating modes used to size governance, evidence, and coordination overhead for delivery work.

modes.name: Patch
modes.use_when: A small, well-understood correction with low uncertainty and no meaningful coordination surface.

modes.name: Scoped change
modes.use_when: A bounded change with clear acceptance criteria, known affected files, and no material discovery risk.

modes.name: Feature
modes.use_when: A feature-sized delivery with multiple implementation steps but a clear solution direction.

modes.name: Uncertain feature
modes.use_when: A feature where the solution, user value, or integration path is uncertain enough to require a probe first.

modes.name: Multi-stream delivery
modes.use_when: Delivery spans concurrent streams, leases, external sync, or coordination boundaries where collision risk matters.
requires: sync/drift checks when external systems are involved
